covered_instructions: Run markdownlint locally and fix violations until zero errors.
Use fenced code blocks with explicit language tags.
Keep list markers consistent throughout a document.
Use ATX-style headings with one H1 per document.
Write with active voice, present tense, and address the reader directly.
Use descriptive kebab-case filenames and group docs into subdirectories.
Enable all markdownlint rules by default.
Include alt text on images and use descriptive link text.
uncovered_instructions: Organize documentation by user journey with shallow hierarchy.
Integrate markdownlint into CI/CD pipelines and pre-commit hooks.
